creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Aleks from comment #3)
Yes. There's simply not enough information here to work out what the problem is, never mind debug it.

If you still have an issue please provide:

 - What you're trying to do
 - What you expect to happen
 - What happened instead
 - All relevant system configuration
 - If this is a network problem, any relevant packet captures.
